title: Securing Digital Banking Apps Against Fake App & Overlay Attacks
persona: Largest State-Owned Commercial Bank in Vietnam
challenge: Attackers used malware mimicking bank apps to gain Accessibility Service permissions, automatically reading OTPs and performing unauthorized transactions on user devices.
solution: Deployed Guardsquare (DexGuard) with RASP (Runtime Application Self-Protection) technology to detect and block all screen recording and overlay insertion attempts.
result: Successfully protected over 15 million banking users, reducing fraud claims related to fake apps by 100%.

title: Securing National Energy Control Infrastructure & Power Grid
persona: Multinational Energy Group & Power Grid Management Unit
challenge: Control software for substations and power transmission risked having control logic cloned or unauthorized intervention from unknown peripheral devices.
solution: Implemented Sentinel LDK HL (Thales) hardware keys with military-grade security chips, allowing execution of critical source code directly inside the key's hardware.
result: Ensured 100% integrity for the grid control system, preventing all reverse engineering and unauthorized software copying attempts.

title: Industrial Intellectual Property (IP) Management in Automated Production Lines
persona: Electronic Component Manufacturer in Global Supply Chain
challenge: Automated machine algorithms were leaked or unauthorizedly copied by operators to devices beyond the company's licensed scope.
solution: Deployed Sentinel LDK (Hybrid) license management system to control software feature activation in real-time and by geographic location.
result: Completely prevented software misuse, helping the company recover 100% of license revenue from operating partners.

title: Privileged Access Control for Global Contractor & Partner Networks (Vendors)
persona: Large-scale Vendor System of a Leading Global Technology Group
challenge: Administrative accounts of subcontractors were frequently targeted by Phishing attacks, creating vulnerabilities for hackers to penetrate the parent group's information infrastructure.
solution: Distributed Longmai physical two-factor authentication tokens (Hardware Tokens) to all technical personnel of partner units accessing internal systems.
result: Completely eliminated account hijacking risks over the network, strengthening supply chain security to international standards.
